caption: Coronal bone CT demonstrates a large traumatic defect of the tegmen tympani [arrow: arrow_WS.png] with herniation of soft tissue into the epitympanum, representing a small acquired cephalocele. The most common complication of a tegmen fracture is transient CSF otorrhea.
